rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to component ports.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for all AGREE contract content.
generic_rules: Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE contracts.
Omit Boolean range clauses unless the port is explicitly defined as an AGREE bool.
Distinguish between component type and implementation scopes for contract elements.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Use eq declarations for range comparisons: eq name : bool = x >= min and x <= max.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not generate unsafe Boolean range clauses for opaque data ports.
irrelevant_topics: Model fusion and architecture redesign patterns
